message:
feat(ops): add index resources monitor and project detail dashboard screens

index_resources.rs (634 lines): Fleet-vs-project comparison screen for
index inventory, embedding backlog, and host resource pressure monitoring.
Renders per-instance rows with health indicators, document counts,
pending job queues, and resource utilization. Supports project-scoped
filtering and fleet-wide aggregation views.

project_detail.rs (835 lines): Project-scoped operational deep-dive
dashboard with rollup summary cards, per-instance inventory, lifecycle
state indicators, and fast drilldown navigation to stream/timeline
surfaces. Integrates attribution evidence traces and SLO health badges
for at-a-glance project health assessment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
